hero.subtitle: Your 24/7 autonomous agency. We don't sell software we return your time. || Recover lost leads and run your business while you sleep.

howItWorks.title: How We Give Your Time Back.
howItWorks.description: We don't give you software to figure out. We deploy a fully autonomous agency tailored to your business in under 48 hours.

steps.title: Audit The Revenue Leaks
steps.desc: Every missed call is revenue handed to your competition. We connect to your existing tools and calculate exactly where you're losing hours and revenue — then deploy a system to recover it instantly.

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.desc: No complicated drag-and-drop builders. Just describe what you need in plain English. Our system dynamically routes your request to the optimal AI model.

steps.title: We Test Everything First
steps.desc: Before anything goes live, our dedicated SecOps AI Agent audits your new workflow for risks (like data leaks or mass emails). You review the sandbox results, approve with one click, and deploy securely.

steps.title: Your Business Runs Itself
steps.desc: Your agents start working 24/7 — answering calls, qualifying leads, booking appointments, and sending you a daily summary. You focus on what matters while TirionApp handles the rest.

callCenter.title: Call Center Agent
callCenter.subtitle: Deploys human-like Voice AI to handle thousands of inbound and outbound calls simultaneously with sub-second response times. Checks your inventory, books appointments in your calendar, and updates your CRM — all during a live phone conversation.

sdr.title: SDR Agent
sdr.subtitle: Autonomously prospects, qualifies, and books meetings around the clock. Mines intent signals across email and CRM data to find your best leads and converts them at rates far above the industry average.

marketing.title: Marketing Agent
marketing.subtitle: Orchestrates multi-channel content distribution with AI-optimized copy. Scales your pipeline growth by automating campaigns across email, social, and ads — with a single approval click before any major spend.

cfo.title: CFO Agent
cfo.subtitle: Delivers real-time financial intelligence across invoicing, cash flow forecasting, and expense tracking. Monitors your runway, alerts you to anomalies, and auto-generates clean reports for your accountant.

agentGenerator.title: Need something bespoke? Just ask in chat.
agentGenerator.subtitle: Forget complex visual editors. TirionApp AI builds and deploys autonomous agents based solely on your description. Conversational. Instant. Scalable.

pricing.subtitle: Subscription + credits included. Buy extra when you need them. Always know what you'll pay.

footer.tagline: AI automation for service businesses. Recover lost leads and run your business 24/7.

sales.title: Sales & Payments
sales.description: Every interaction is a chance to close — and get paid. TirionApp handles lead qualification the moment a prospect reaches out, sends personalized follow-up sequences that feel human, and manages contracts from draft to signature. Once the deal closes, automated billing triggers instantly, professional invoices go out after every job, and intelligent recovery workflows recapture revenue you would have otherwise lost.

operations.title: Operations
operations.description: The invisible backbone of your business, running on autopilot. Your meetings schedule themselves around everyone's availability, reports compile overnight and land in your inbox by morning, support tickets are triaged and resolved before they pile up, and new client onboarding flows happen without a single manual step.

communication.title: Communication & Content
communication.description: Be everywhere your customers are, without being tied to a screen. AI phone calls answer and qualify leads 24/7, WhatsApp converts inquiries into bookings, emails nurture relationships at scale, and web chat captures visitors instantly. Meanwhile, your best moments become social media posts that feel authentic, long-form content gets repurposed into shorts and stories, and a smart scheduling engine posts when your audience is most active.

reputation.title: Reputation & Retention
reputation.description: Your online presence, protected and growing on its own. Satisfied clients receive gentle nudges to leave reviews right after service, every review gets a thoughtful response, and continuous monitoring alerts you when your brand is mentioned. Predictive models flag churn risk before a customer thinks about leaving, personalized referral programs turn happy clients into your best salespeople, and loyalty rewards make staying with you the obvious choice.

agentGeneratorChat.userMsg1: Build a workflow that checks info@myagency.com for urgent tickets. If urgent, create a Zendesk ticket AND ping Slack. Otherwise, log it to Postgres.
agentGeneratorChat.aiMsg1: Understood. I'll need access to Slack, Zendesk, and the PostgreSQL instance. Use existing credentials?
agentGeneratorChat.deployed: Deployed! The visual logic map to the right shows your real-time data flow.

agents.title: Call Center Agent
agents.subtitle: Your AI receptionist answers every call, books appointments, checks availability, and updates your CRM — all in real-time. Never miss a lead again.

agents.title: SDR Agent

agents.title: Marketing Agent

agents.title: CFO Agent
agents.subtitle: Tracks invoices, monitors cash flow, and alerts you to financial risks before they become problems. Board-ready reports on demand.

faqsComponent.title: Common Questions
faqsComponent.description: Quick answers to help you evaluate if TirionApp is the right fit for your operation.

list.question: How does TirionApp work with the tools I already use?
list.answer: TirionApp connects to your existing CRM, email, calendar, and communication platforms through standard integrations. You don't need to migrate anything — we work on top of what you already have.

list.question: Is my business data safe?
list.answer: Yes. Every workflow is audited by a dedicated Security AI Agent before deployment to prevent data leaks or bad actions. We also employ strict Guardrails to prevent prompt-injection attacks. Your data is encrypted, never shared, and never used to train our models.

list.question: What happens if an automation doesn't know how to handle something?
list.answer: It stops immediately and sends you a notification with full context. You're always in control — no automation will ever make a decision it's not confident about.

list.question: How quickly can I get started?
list.answer: Most businesses have their first automation running within 48 hours. Our AI interviews you about your needs and builds the solution — no technical setup required on your end.

list.question: Is there a free trial?
list.answer: Yes! 14 days free with 200 credits and 1 active automation — no credit card required. That's enough to fully experience how TirionApp can transform your operations.

list.question: Am I locked into a specific AI provider?
list.answer: No. TirionApp dynamically routes your task to the best and latest models in the market for complex reasoning, code generation, and rapid validations. We manage the infra so you just focus on the results.

list.question: Can I use TirionApp if I have a larger team or enterprise needs?
list.answer: Absolutely. Our Scale plan includes dedicated infrastructure, unlimited automations, and priority support. Contact our sales team for custom solutions.
